calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-21-2015 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Bancroft & Mcalister, Llps Further Response To Special Interrogatory No. 33 And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. LISA BATTISTA, ESQ. of Gwire Law Offices, Tel No. 415-296-8880 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. JOSE R. GONZALEZ, ESQ. of Jampol Zimet LLP, Tel No. 213-689-8500 appearing telephonically for Defendants Bancroft & McAlister LLP and Richard Nelson.

RULING - Parties stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER SEIDEL'S Motion To Compel Defendant Bancroft & Mcalister, LLP's Further Response To Special Interrogatory No. 33 is granted. The defendants properly exercised their option to produce documents in lieu of a written response pursuant to CCP 2030.230. However defendants failed to specify which writings of the 2,390 pages produced are responsive to the special interrogatory. Defendants shall specify each document which supports their contention by Bates stamp number and/or date of transcript and page number within ten court days from the date of this Order. Specification by defendants' counsel of evidentiary documents is not protected attorney work-product. See Cioto vs. Superior Court (2012) 54 Cal. 4th 480. Both parties' request for sanctions is denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
